{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Aurelian Banker’s Union
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Aurelian Banker’s Union]] submitted a rejected proposal regarding financial terminology.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c4">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
